# RQ1 — SEAMLESS frozen deployment (train 600 + frozen tail 200 on the SAME env)

**Auto-generated by `scripts/deploy_seamless_driver.ps1` -> `scripts/analyze_seamless.py`** (detached). NUMBERS ONLY; no conclusions drawn. The operator cross-checks the raw `.mat`. Tail = 200 frozen episodes at the certified sigma=0.3, AoI NOT reset, env continued from the end of training (renew_positions every 20 ep). worst = `viol_rate_seamless.max()`.

## 1. Per seed: training worst-platoon vs frozen seamless-tail worst-platoon

| arm | seed | train worst | tail worst | tail net-mean | gap(tail-train) | canon AoI match |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| soft | 2 | 0.491 | 0.627 | 0.226 | +0.136 | YES |
| soft | 3 | 0.333 | 0.582 | 0.253 | +0.250 | YES |
| soft | 4 | 0.216 | 0.403 | 0.213 | +0.187 | YES |
| soft | 5 | 0.407 | 0.251 | 0.156 | -0.156 | YES |
| soft | 6 | 0.327 | 0.211 | 0.118 | -0.115 | YES |
| soft | 7 | 0.352 | 0.534 | 0.201 | +0.182 | YES |
| pid | 2 | 0.138 | 0.177 | 0.085 | +0.039 | YES |
| pid | 3 | 0.165 | 0.243 | 0.132 | +0.078 | YES |
| pid | 4 | 0.115 | 0.132 | 0.104 | +0.017 | YES |
| pid | 5 | 0.119 | 0.312 | 0.190 | +0.192 | YES |
| pid | 6 | 0.125 | 0.241 | 0.099 | +0.116 | YES |
| pid | 7 | 0.095 | 0.084 | 0.069 | -0.011 | YES |

## 2. Pooled worst-platoon violation (over seeds 2-7)

| arm | training (last-100ep) | seamless tail (frozen, sigma=0.3) |
|---|---|---|
| soft | 0.354+-0.091 | 0.435+-0.175 |
| pid | 0.126+-0.024 | 0.198+-0.083 |

(reference: the --eval_only restart-geometry warm eval gave pid tail-worst ~0.35; training pid worst ~0.13.)

**(b) Scenario_Reconstruct.pkl present in every run:** ALL PASS
